name: Elevated Temperature Chemical Storage Reporting
description: Create a new facility named 'Granite Paving & Materials - Plant 4' in EPA Tier2 Submit. Then, add a new chemical inventory entry for 'Asphalt, petroleum' (CAS: 8052-42-4). Configure the chemical with EHS = No, and mark it as a Pure chemical. For Health Hazards, select 'Carcinogenicity' and 'Respiratory or Skin Sensitization'. For Physical Hazards, select 'Hazard Not Otherwise Classified (HNOC)' and enter 'Thermal Burn Hazard' in the description. Set the Inventory quantities: Maximum Daily Amount = Range Code 07 (100,000 - 999,999 lbs), Average Daily Amount = Range Code 06 (10,000 - 99,999 lbs), and Days On-Site to exactly 250. Add two storage locations: Storage Location 1 (Description: 'Tank AC-1 - Primary Tank Farm') and Storage Location 2 (Description: 'Tank AC-2 - Secondary Tank Farm'). For BOTH locations, set Storage Type to 'Above ground tank', Storage Pressure to 'Ambient pressure', Storage Temperature to 'Greater than ambient temperature', and Physical State to 'Liquid'. Finally, save and export the submission file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\Granite_Paving_Plant4.t2s'.
